title: Lunar Eclipse
description: This mod adds 4 new biomes, dozens of new items ,50+ structures and 30+ mobs to the game.
body:
**This mod requires GeckoLib!**

 

## If You Have Got Any Good Idea You Must Come To My Discord Server! [https://discord.gg/N5Wh3jcgan](https://discord.gg/N5Wh3jcgan)

**Echoes of the Tove Ambiance Song Added**

**Tove's Castle Ambiance Song Added**

**Tove's Day Ambiance Song Added**

**R&d Music - Lost in the Past Music Disc Added**

([https://open.spotify.com/track/45WBf1iykOhxnwjRD7zNoF?si=63b47f008a5d4cb0](https://open.spotify.com/track/45WBf1iykOhxnwjRD7zNoF?si=63b47f008a5d4cb0))


### Blood

 *8 New mobs added

 *15+ Structures added

 *2 New bosses added

 *30+ Items added

 

### -Tove                                                                 


 *5 New structures added

 *5 New mobs added

 *New boss added

 *10+ Items added

 

### -Bone

 *3 New Structures Added

 *4 New Mobs Added 

 *New Boss Added

 *10+ Items Added

 

### -Netherice

 *6+ New Mobs Added

 *4 New Structures Added

 *New Boss Added



###  -Also except that things,

 *20+ Structures added

 *10+ Items added

 *20+ advancement added
